notes: The cross-device release. Draw on your phone, take over in a served desktop browser, draw there, take it back — the Image baton pass now carries every stroke both ways, live, verified end-to-end on real hardware. Three deep fixes got it there: the high-resolution compositor worker no longer crashes in production builds (synced documents could render blank), synced pixels repaint immediately instead of waiting for your next brushstroke, and the phone's LAN relay no longer drops the request parameters that authorize a connected browser's edits. Licensing is verified on Android: the same offline key activates commercial exports on desktop and phone. Everything from 0.9.9 (motion comics, the pro-editing batch, the Community license model) rides along.
